title: becium neumannii
intro: Becium neumannii, a plant species native to Africa, is a flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure and fighting off infections. Becium neumannii can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
